title: Giant Brown Mushroom
description: Adds a giant Brown Mushroom to the Dark Forest and Mushroom Fields biome.
body:
### Giant Brown Mushroom

**This simple mod adds a giant Brown Mushroom to the Dark Forest and Mushroom Fields biome.**

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bca27acf6c19bccc81b8156751637983626d2349.jpeg)

- The terrain around the Mushroom is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- perfect spot to build a base.
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
